subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the divine fragrances! Such souls as hasten from this darksome world unto the luminous realm, although [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات الله نفوسیکه از این عالم ظلمانی بجهان نورانی شتابند هر چند
subcodes.subjects: @law of burial and cremation, @soul; spirit after death
